mnemonics.title: GAN Components
mnemonics.content: Generative Adversarial Network = Generator (G) + Adversary (D) + Noise (N)

acronyms.usage: Optimization objective in VAEs balancing reconstruction and regularization

visualTips.visualization: Imagine an hourglass: Input → Encoder (narrows to μ/σ) → Latent Sample → Decoder (expands to output)

analogies.analogy: Counterfeiter (Generator) vs Police (Discriminator) in an arms race to create better fake money
